name: grammar-tools
description: Validate and compile .tokens and .grammar files. Reports syntax errors, duplicate definitions, undefined references, and cross-file consistency issues. Can also compile grammar files into native language representations for zero-overhead embedding.

flags.description: Write output to this file path instead of stdout (used with compile-tokens and compile-grammar)

arguments.name: COMMAND
arguments.description: Command to run: validate | validate-tokens | validate-grammar | compile-tokens | compile-grammar

arguments.name: FILES
arguments.description: Grammar files to process (1 or 2 paths depending on command)
